display_text: Illusionist's Cape, Cost: 0: Tier 2 Neutral item providing +14 Agility, +14 Strength, and the Create Illusion active ability. Creates an illusion under your control for 30 seconds, dealing 50% outgoing damage and taking 200% incoming damage. The Illusion Mastery passive increases damage of all units and illusions controlled by the hero by 6%. Stats: CD: 30s, Illusion Duration: 30s, Illusion Damage: 50%, Illusion Damage Taken: 200%, Bonus: +14 Str, +14 Agi.
